mapper.sql: id, member_id as memberId, title, type, visit_date as visitDate, lat, lng, description, photo, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.select: select from hotplaces order by created_at desc
select from hotplaces where member_id = #{memberId} order by created_at desc
select count(*) from hotplaces where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into hotplaces (id, member_id, title, type, visit_date, lat, lng, description, photo, created_at) values (#{id}, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{type}, #{visitDate}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{description}, #{photo}, current_timestamp)
mapper.delete: delete from hotplaces where id = #{id} and member_id = #{memberId}
